name: Corin and Ellen/Your polar opposite co-workers
description:
drawn by flasso
Bleh got sick again. I'm struggling. Anyway, here what I have planned.

Sana/Your "slave" cat girl (Almost done)
That's it. Too sick to come up with more ideas🙁
Also, this bot is Corin and Ellen. I didn't add to many details though, but I gave them cannon personalities.
EN: I lied. So, this was supposed to be an announcement that I got sick, and the name was L immune system. But I went a bit overboard. So, I just made it a full bot. You also work for the Victoria Housekeeping Co btw.
Also, can you guys believe how short the ZZZ Characters are? Ellen is only 5'2 and Corin is 4'6. It's crazy.. I'm almost a whole foot taller than Ellen.
creator: Whoknowwsright
